title: Is it bye-bye for Biden?
shortDescription: The pressure is mounting for the president's campaign. It's Wednesday's news.

title: Biden has repeatedly used 'end of quote' phrase | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden saying "end of quote" here isn't a gaffe. He used the phrase after reading directly from Justice Sonia Sotomayor's dissent.

title: OnPolitics: Michelle Obama would beat Donald Trump, new poll shows
shortDescription: Former first lady Michelle Obama would beat former President Donald Trump in a hypothetical match-up, according to a new poll.

title: Arizona's Raúl Grijalva calls on Joe Biden to withdraw from race
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Raúl Grijalva, a long-serving Arizona Democrat, is now the second House Democrat to call on Biden to end his candidacy.

title: South Carolina female senators voted out after abortion split
shortDescription: Three SC Republican women, key in blocking a total abortion ban, will not return to the state's upper chamber after losing their June primary races.

title: 'No one's pushing me out': Biden tells campaign he's not withdrawing
shortDescription: President Joe Biden sought to reassure a nervous campaign Wednesday that he will be the Democratic nominee, telling his staff he is not withdrawing.

title: New poll shows Trump widening lead over Biden post debate
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump’s lead against President Joe Biden has widened after Biden’s shaky debate performance last week.

title: Color TV and frisbees: What else is younger than Trump and Biden?
shortDescription: What's youngest than the two presidential candidates? A lot of things including color TV, frisbees, and the high five gesture.

title: Who could replace Biden if he drops out of the race?
shortDescription: If President Joe Biden decides not to seek re-election, who are some of the top choices to replace him on the Democratic ticket?

title: Michelle Obama would beat Donald Trump, poll finds
shortDescription: Following Joe Biden's presidential debate performance, Democrats have been worried about the odds of winning this November election.

title: Ivanka Trump weighs in on her father's legal challenges
shortDescription: Ivanka Trump said in a new interview that it’s “painful to experience” watching her father involved in legal woes.

title: California bill requires bars to keep on-site drug test kits
shortDescription: A new law in California states that bars and clubs are now required to offer kits to test for date rape drugs.

title: 2 Civil War soldiers involved in famous train heist get Medal of Honor
shortDescription: Two soldiers from Ohio regiments who participated in a Civil War locomotive chase were finally awarded the Medal of Honor.

title: Exclusive: Major Biden donors 'unsatisfied' by answers on debate
shortDescription: They say Biden’s approach is self-centered and out of touch with the growing majority of younger Democrats.

title: Trump's sentencing delayed after SCOTUS immunity ruling | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: President Biden to meet Wednesday with Democratic governors. Rudy Giuliani loses law license after court says he lied about 2020 election.

title: Michelle Obama would beat Donald Trump in 2024, a new poll finds
shortDescription: Former First Lady Michelle Obama would beat former President Donald Trump in a hypothetical match up, according to a new poll.

title: Nebraska's heated school voucher debate is back on the ballot.
shortDescription: Voters in the Cornhusker State will get another chance to vote on school vouchers in November.

title: GOP rising star Sen. Katie Britt is a long shot Trump VP pick
shortDescription: Sen. Katie Britt, R-Ala., is no stranger to controversy. The buzz she generates is enough to earn her a spot in the Trump VP conversation.

title: 'I nearly fell asleep on stage': Biden blames travel for debate debacle
shortDescription: President Biden blamed recent travels overseas for his rough debate, even though he returned to the US 12 days before taking the stage against Trump.

title: Tammy Baldwin won't appear with Joe Biden during Wisconsin visit
shortDescription: Tammy Baldwin will be in northeastern Wisconsin on a pre-planned statewide tour when Joe Biden campaigns in Madison on Friday.

title: These Republicans are pleading with Democrats to take action after disastrous debate
shortDescription: Members of the never-Trump movement are frustrated with the Biden campaign's debate response.

title: Gen Z voters share their feelings on Biden and Trump
shortDescription: USA TODAY spoke with young voters from across America to understand their feelings about the choices in the upcoming presidential election.

title: Trump boosts post calling for a military tribunal for Liz Cheney
shortDescription: Donald Trump reposted a post on Truth Social that called for a military tribunal for former Wyoming representative, Liz Cheney.
